description: Follow-up sweep: address phase-gated B single-season expiry regression by raising safe buffer. Based on post-fix sweep analysis 2026-04-13.

scenarios.name: phase-gated-safe-24h-v1
scenarios.description: Phase-gated sink at baseline rates with safe buffer raised to 24h gross earnings (vs default 12h). Targets the B single-season expiry regression where EARLY drain reduces coins below lock-in threshold.

scenarios.name: phase-gated-safe-48h-v1
scenarios.description: Phase-gated sink at baseline rates with safe buffer raised to 48h gross earnings. Aggressive protection for early-game accumulation; tests upper bound of safe buffer effectiveness.

scenarios.name: phase-gated-high-floor-v1
scenarios.description: Phase-gated sink with 24h safe hours AND raised absolute floor (40000 coins vs default 20000). Dual protection: safe hours guard active players, floor guards low-earner joiners.

scenarios.name: phase-gated-plus-inflation-tighten-v1
scenarios.description: Phase-gated sink combined with inflation-tighten-plus-ubi overrides. Tests whether sink + inflation market pressure together produce a stable combined effect without the perverse single-season inflation-tighten behavior.
